# Geotechnik — Oberhausen

> Geotechnical engineering services in Oberhausen, Deutschland.

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Oberhausen, Deutschland.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
